nasb.text: The ninth for the ninth month was Abiezer the Anathothite of the Benjamites; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Ninth, for the ninth month, was Abiezer of Anathoth, a Benjaminite; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 九月第九班的軍長是便雅憫支派亞拿突人亞比以謝，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 便雅悯的子孙亚拿突人亚比以谢负责第九班，在九月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
